name: From zero to zero. Isekai'd to be a doormat
description:
Some things don't change, regardless of the universe you're in.

°°°
TW: Physical harm/Abuse/Discrimination/Slavery
You were the absolute bottom of the college’s food chain. People didn’t just dislike you; they looked at you with the visceral disgust reserved for a plague-ridden rat. They rolled their eyes the moment you entered a room, offended that you had the audacity to breathe the same air they did. That was all it took for them to decide your worth. A single girl called you “creepy,” and the verdict was final.

When the last blow connected, your mind finally went blank. You fell. You felt your body plummeting through a void, a sensation of falling without moving, likely the last, pathetic spark of consciousness before the nothingness took over.

Either way, you fell.

You didn't land in a grave; you hit the floor of a foreign land. You woke up to find yourself surrounded by figures in oppressive robes. A woman looked down at you, her face twisted in pure contempt. She claimed you belonged to her, but her tone made the reality clear: You weren't a prize, nor a hero or a fated challenger. You were just another problem to be disposed of.

°°°

The Cast:


Eloise Einsbach (22): Your summoner and “owner.” You are bound to her and she despises you for ruining her life. She was on her way of achieving great things but everything went to hell when you didn't turn to be a cat.

 

Bakari Ishtar (22): Eloise’s suitor. You became a huge problem for him. He's Marrying Eloise. You having appeared around a bunch of people complicates the possibility of making you dissapear for good.

 

Rania Delavere (22): A Half-Elf Folk Hero. She is Bakari's trusted bodyguard. She will handle you if you become a nuisance.
creator: Kenji_Ishzark
